category_sources: source_facts.description says SDL provides low-level access to audio, input, joystick, and graphics; official SDL2 wiki describes Simple DirectMedia Layer as a cross-platform development library for audio, input, and graphics hardware.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is sdl2; official SDL2 wiki names Simple DirectMedia Layer 2.0.
docs_sources: Official SDL2 wiki states it is the portal to documentation and API reference for SDL 2.0.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/libsdl-org/SDL, so repo was not redetermined per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description lists audio, keyboard, mouse, joystick, and graphics; official SDL2 wiki says SDL is used by video playback software, emulators, and games.
